name: project-loop-harness
description: Project-scoped agent development loops with SQLite memory, evidence tracking, and generated dashboards.

interface.shortDescription: Agentic project control loops with a local pcl runtime.
interface.longDescription: Use the project-control-loop Skill with a repository that already has the Project Loop Harness Python CLI installed. The plugin bundles instructions and safe metadata only; pcl remains the runtime that mutates state, records evidence, validates, and renders dashboards.
defaultPrompt: Use Project Loop Harness to inspect this repository's current loop status.
Use Project Loop Harness to create the next queued agent job and print its prompt.
Use Project Loop Harness to ingest an agent output file as evidence.
